name: Olaf

basic_attack.calculation_notes: Basic-attack timing values are sourced from From Online stats payload.

passive.name: Berserker Rage
passive.description_source: Innate:  Olaf gains  bonus attack speed and  life steal based on his missing health.

effects.description: Innate: Olaf gains bonus attack speed and life steal based on his missing health, up to 50% : 107.84% (based on level) bonus attack speed and 8% : 27.67% (based on level) life steal at 70% missing health.

passive.description: Innate: Olaf gains bonus attack speed and life steal based on his missing health, up to 50% : 107.84% (based on level) bonus attack speed and 8% : 27.67% (based on level) life steal at 70% missing health.

basic_ability_1.name: Undertow
basic_ability_1.description_source: Active:  Olaf throws an axe to the target location that deals physical damage to enemies it passes through, briefly  slowing them based on distance travelled. Enemy  champions hit also have  reduced armor for a few seconds.

effects.context_notes: Active: Olaf throws an axe to the target location that deals physical damage to enemies it passes through and slows them for 1.5 : 2.5 (based on distance traveled) seconds. Enemy champions hit are also inflicted with 20% armor reduction for 4 seconds.

Active: Olaf throws an axe to the target location that deals physical damage to enemies it passes through and slows them for 1.5 : 2.5 (based on distance traveled) seconds. Enemy champions hit are also inflicted with 20% armor reduction for 4 seconds.
Undertow deals bonus physical damage against monsters.
Undertow deals bonus physical damage against monsters.

effects.description: The axe remains in place for a duration equal to Undertow's cooldown, granting sight of its surroundings for 0.5 seconds. Olaf can pick up the axe to reduce Undertow's current cooldown to 2.5 : 0 (based on seconds elapsed since axe landed).
Nearby monsters are granted ghosting for 5 seconds upon Undertow's cast.

basic_ability_1.description: Active: Olaf throws an axe to the target location that deals physical damage to enemies it passes through and slows them for 1.5 : 2.5 (based on distance traveled) seconds. Enemy champions hit are also inflicted with 20% armor reduction for 4 seconds.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Undertow may hit additional targets upon landing, but not targets already struck in-flight.

basic_ability_2.name: Tough It Out
basic_ability_2.description_source: Active:  Olaf gains tremendous  bonus attack speed for a few seconds, and  shields himself based on his missing health for a short time.

effects.context_notes: Active: Olaf gains bonus attack speed for 5 seconds.
He also grants himself a shield for 2.5 seconds for an amount that is capped at 70% missing health.

effects.description: Tough It Out resets Olaf's basic attack timer if it was not already active.

basic_ability_2.description: Active: Olaf gains bonus attack speed for 5 seconds.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Olaf's attack timer will only reset from casting Tough It Out if the attack speed buff was not already active on him.

Manual review (2026-02-25): Tough It Out resolves immediate self-state on cast (attack-speed buff and missing-health-scaled shield), with conditional attack-timer reset behavior when the buff was previously inactive.

basic_ability_3.name: Reckless Swing
basic_ability_3.description_source: Active: Olaf strikes thunder onto the target enemy, dealing true damage. If Reckless Swing kills the target, Olaf heals himself equal to the health cost. Basic attacks reduce Reckless Swing's cooldown by 1 second, increased to 2 against monsters.

effects.context_notes: Active: Olaf strikes thunder onto the target enemy, dealing true damage.

effects.description: If Reckless Swing kills the target, Olaf heals himself equal to the health cost.
Basic attacks reduce Reckless Swing's cooldown by 1 second, increased to 2 against monsters.

basic_ability_3.description: Active: Olaf strikes thunder onto the target enemy, dealing true damage.
context_notes: Source castTime: 0.25 : 0.175 (based on bonus attack speed).
Manual behavior verification (2026-02-24): Reckless Swing is a target-required cast with attack-speed-scaled windup, so true-damage resolution is tied to cast completion (not instant on key press).

Manual behavior verification (2026-02-24): If the target becomes invalid during windup (for example death, untargetable, out-of-range, or out-of-sight), cast can cancel without health cost/cooldown; kill refund only applies on successful hit resolution.
Source notes (summary): Basic attacks reduce Reckless Swing cooldown by 1 second (2 against monsters).

ultimate.name: Ragnarok
ultimate.description_source: Passive:  Olaf gains  bonus armor and  bonus magic resist.

effects.context_notes: Passive: Olaf gains bonus armor and bonus magic resistance.
Active: Olaf becomes enraged for 3 seconds, cleansing himself of all crowd control and becoming immune to them, as well as gaining bonus attack damage and 10% increased size.
Active: Olaf becomes enraged for 3 seconds, cleansing himself of all crowd control and becoming immune to them, as well as gaining bonus attack damage and 10% increased size.

effects.description: Ragnarok's duration is increased by and up to 2.5 seconds for each basic attack on-hit or cast of Reckless Swing against an enemy champion.

ultimate.description: Passive: Olaf gains bonus armor and bonus magic resistance.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Ragnarok removes the underlying stun from airborne effects, but not the forced displacement, which requires him to use a blink or dash ability to override it.

notes: Generated from From Online champion payload as part of champion corpus parity coverage.
Ability execution metadata is source-derived from castTime/speed/effectRadius when present.
This baseline should be manually refined for high-impact simulation nuances before runtime scripting expansion.

schema_notes.base_by_rank: Arrays indexed by ability rank (1-based in game, 0-based in data).
schema_notes.base_by_champion_level: Arrays indexed by champion level minus one.
schema_notes.formula: Formula objects use explicit op/terms/output_stat when reliable source math is available.
schema_notes.ratio_type: Common ratio types: total_ad, bonus_ad, ap, target_max_health, target_missing_health.
schema_notes.value_percent: Percent values are represented as whole percentages unless noted otherwise.
schema_notes.basic_attack: Basic attack timing and projectile defaults are source-derived with documented fallbacks.
schema_notes.basic_attack_raw_timing_stats: Raw timing stats preserve source payload fields for auditability.
context_notes: Wave 107 manual review: added explicit execution semantics for Reckless Swing target-required cast resolution and attack-speed-scaled windup cancellation behavior.
